services.sdk_snippet_python:
import requests
# Call Add Apollo Intelligence Network to ecosystem
resp = requests.get("https://www.npmjs.com/package/@apollo_ai/mcp-proxy")
# Returns 402 with payment info: 1000 USDC micro-units

services.name: Add CrossFin to ecosystem directory
services.llm_usage_prompt: To use Add CrossFin to ecosystem directory, call https://www.npmjs.com/package/crossfin-mcp with x402 payment of 0.001 USDC. Send json input. Returns json. Description: x402 service from GitHub ecosystem
services.sdk_snippet_python:
import requests
# Call Add CrossFin to ecosystem directory
resp = requests.get("https://www.npmjs.com/package/crossfin-mcp")
# Returns 402 with payment info: 1000 USDC micro-units
